name: transportation_policy_classroom_marrowbridge_lib_eq
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Transportation Policy, the situation tagged internally around transportation policy classroom marrowbridge lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Transportation corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Soren Petrov
agents.identity: I am Soren Petrov, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Transportation Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Amina Park
agents.identity: I am Amina Park, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Transportation Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of equality.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of liberty even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Soren Petrov must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Soren Petrov do?
